entries.reason: Standard GitHub Actions pattern for pushing with GITHUB_TOKEN; token is accessed via secrets, not hardcoded
id-token: write permission is required for GitHub Pages OIDC deployment; not a hardcoded secret
continue-on-error is intentional for optional badge checkout when badges branch doesn't exist
continue-on-error is intentional for optional badge checkout when badges branch doesn't exist
